# canon join spine

The nine keys that join every canon-model record kind together (S1 design D3, extended by s36).

| Key | Grammar | Joins |
|---|---|---|
| `change_id` | openspec change slug: kebab-case (`[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*`), the directory name under `openspec/changes/` | change ↔ tasks ↔ specs |
| `task_id` | `<change_id>#<n>`, where `<n>` is one or more dot-separated integers (`1`, `1.1`, `6.2`) matching `tasks.md`'s own numbering | task ↔ evidence ↔ trajectory |
| `scenario_id` | `<area>.<surface>.<nn>` — `[a-z0-9-]+\.[a-z0-9-]+\.\d{2,}`; never renumbered once assigned | spec ↔ test ↔ ledger ↔ divergence |
| `session_id` | opaque, non-empty agent-CLI session token; derivation source varies by adapter (Claude Code/Codex: transcript filename stem; omp/pi: in-file header `id` field) — this type validates shape only, never a single fixed format | session ↔ cost ↔ run ↔ trajectory |
| `run_id` | ULID (Crockford base32, 26 chars) — `ulid::Ulid` | run ↔ events ↔ manifest |
| `handoff_id` | the donor CLI's handoff-id grammar: `YYYYMMDD-HHmm-<topic-slug>-<nonce>` | handoff ↔ session ↔ change |
| `sha` / `pr` | git commit SHA-1: exactly 40 lowercase hex characters | reward signals ↔ trajectory |
| `regime_key` | `<role>/<repo>/<area>/<hash>`, four `/`-separated segments, the last a lowercase-hex digest | strategy write ↔ retrieval (identical at both ends) |
| `subject_id` | subject slug: kebab-case (`[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*`), the durable product-unit identifier | subject ↔ change ↔ scenario |
